result.stdout:
Description:
  Industrial Studio IoT IPC Server

Usage:
  ant-ipc-server [options]

Options:
  --port <port>          port [default: 4000]
  --instance <instance>  Instance name []
  --verbose <verbose>    Trace in console: 0: Nolog, 1:Error, 2:+Warn, 3:+Info, 4:+Debug [default: 0]
  --https                Serve over https [default: False]
  --browser              Open a browser in the URL when server starts [default: False]
  --clients <clients>    Specify the clients ports separated by commas, ie: http://localhost:4005, http://localhost:4010 []
  --version              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
